creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
I see the same error message on boot. However, my wireless card works fine.

Here's my pciconf info:

iwm0@pci0:3:0:0:    class=0x028000 rev=0x29 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x8086 device=0x2526 subvendor=0x8086 subdevice=0x0014
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = 'Wi-Fi 5(802.11ac) Wireless-AC 9x6x [Thunder Peak]'
    class      = network

iwmbtfw(8) says it supports 7260/8260/8265 but mine is a 9x6x - I believe a 9260.

What is causing the attempted firmware download? And why does it happen if this command doesn't support my card, and my card works fine anyway?
